accessibility.text: Using platforms like Amazon EC2 combined with Docker and Flask makes deploying optimized models straightforward and scalable.
Example: Quantizing DistilBERT significantly reduces memory usage and improves inference speed with minimal accuracy loss.
Distillation, Quantization, and Pruning are key methods to reduce the size and computational demands of LLMs while maintaining performance.
Example: Deploying a quantized model on Amazon EC2 ensures efficient use of resources and quick response times.
